forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 2da44e
+description: 'Stable, short, human-friendly task IDs derived from the ULID (last 7 Crockford chars, lowercase), displayed/entered as ^<short> references. Inspired by kenn-io/kata. Full ULID stays canonical; short id is presentation + lookup. Uniqueness enforced at create (regenerate ULID on collision). Sigil is ^ (our filter-DSL reference sigil; # is taken by tags). Layered onto the existing ^ mention plumbing, which today keys on slugify(title) rather than id — the core change is title-slug → short-id identity.'
+name: Short Task IDs
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: 2da44e
-description: 'Stable, short, human-friendly task IDs derived from the ULID (last 7 Crockford chars, lowercase), displayed/entered as ^<short> references. Inspired by kenn-io/kata. Full ULID stays canonical; short id is presentation + lookup. Uniqueness enforced at create (regenerate ULID on collision). Sigil is ^ (our filter-DSL reference sigil; # is taken by tags). Layered onto the existing ^ mention plumbing, which today keys on slugify(title) rather than id — the core change is title-slug → short-id identity.'
-name: Short Task IDs
